relics.name: Hefty Tablet
relics.description: Upon picked, choose 1 of 3 Rare cards to add to your Deck, add 1 Injury to your deck.
relics.flavorText: Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...

relics.name: Phial Holster
relics.description: Upon picked, gain a potion slot and a random potion.
relics.flavorText: Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...

relics.name: Winged Boots
relics.description: You may ignore paths when traversing the map up to 3 times.
relics.flavorText: Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...

relics.name: Neow's Bones
relics.description: Gain a random curse and 2 random Neow relics.
relics.flavorText: Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...
